page_metadata.biotools__summary: Distant homology detection method based on sequence profile-profile comparison. It takes a protein sequence or multiple sequence alignment as input and searches for remote homologs in SCOP, PDB and PFAM databases.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Distant homology detection method based on sequence profile-profile comparison. It takes a protein sequence or multiple sequence alignment as input and searches for remote homologs in SCOP, PDB and PFAM databases.
